title: OUTPATIENT PROGRAMS - 211info
text: CAVE JUNCTION OUTPATIENT PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive outpatient treatment for substance use, mental health, and co-occurring conditions. Also provides gambling disorder counseling. 219 S Redwood Hwy Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Outpatient: Unrestricted Partial hospitalization or day treatment: Individuals with severe mental illness and substance use disorders Hours: Monday-Saturday 8am-5pm (541) 592-5350 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 592-5350 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Oregon Health Plan (OHP) private insurance, sliding scale fees available for uninsured clients DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday 8am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 8-6:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Family Resource Center/Coalition facility. From US199 (Redwood Highway), turn left on E River Street. Travel approximately 0.5 miles. The facility will be on the right. Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Gambling Disorder Counseling Substance Use Disorder Day Treatment If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CAVE JUNCTION
